messages.content:
Dear all,

It's been a cracking Test series between England and India, so we thought we'd give away an Alastair Cook signed shirt. Easy (Facebook exclusive) competition - just predict the series result.

Just go here to enter: http://www.espncricinfo.com/ci/content/url/525378.html

And good luck!

Cricinfo

Brace yourselves. The World Cup is nearly here. Don't forget to RSVP our Event below - and you can follow each and every team on Facebook by "liking" them below, receiving the latest news from us within seconds of our journalists filing:

http://www.espncricinfo.com/icc_cricket_worldcup2011/content/site/facebook/index.html

Enjoy the tournament and our coverage,

ESPNcricinfo

Event details below

http://www.facebook.com/event.php?eid=189325917758356&index=1
